full_text:
Ding Li 丁立
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ding Li (丁立). Shu officer. Died in the year following Kongming’s occupation of Hanzhong. Ding Li was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Ding Li lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
